title: GitHub Copilot Seat Management Schema
description: JSON Schema for GitHub Copilot seat assignment, billing, and user management objects returned by the Copilot REST API.

SimpleUser.title: Simple User
SimpleUser.description: A GitHub user account assigned to a Copilot seat.

login.description: The username of the GitHub user.

id.description: The unique numeric identifier of the user.

node_id.description: The GraphQL global node ID for this user.

avatar_url.description: URL to the user's avatar image.

gravatar_id.description: Gravatar identifier for the user, if set.

url.description: API URL for this user resource.

html_url.description: URL to the user's GitHub profile page.

followers_url.description: API URL listing the user's followers.

following_url.description: API URL template for users this user follows.

gists_url.description: API URL template for the user's gists.

starred_url.description: API URL template for the user's starred repos.

subscriptions_url.description: API URL listing the user's subscriptions.

organizations_url.description: API URL listing the user's organizations.

repos_url.description: API URL listing the user's repositories.

events_url.description: API URL template for the user's events.

received_events_url.description: API URL listing events received by the user.

type.description: The type of account (User, Organization, Bot, etc.).

site_admin.description: Whether the user is a GitHub site administrator.

Team.title: Team
Team.description: A GitHub team through which a Copilot seat was assigned.

node_id.description: The GraphQL global node ID for this team.

slug.description: URL-friendly slug of the team name.

description.description: A short description of the team.

privacy.description: The visibility level of the team.

permission.description: The default permission level for the team.

url.description: API URL for this team resource.

html_url.description: URL to the team's GitHub page.

members_url.description: API URL template for team members.

repositories_url.description: API URL listing the team's repositories.

SeatBreakdown.title: Seat Breakdown
SeatBreakdown.description: Breakdown of Copilot seat counts by status within an organization.

total.description: Total number of Copilot seats in the organization.

added_this_cycle.description: Number of seats added during the current billing cycle.

pending_invitation.description: Number of seats with pending invitations that have not been accepted.

pending_cancellation.description: Number of seats pending cancellation at the end of the billing cycle.

active_this_cycle.description: Number of seats that have been active during the current billing cycle.

inactive_this_cycle.description: Number of seats that have been inactive during the current billing cycle.

CopilotSeatDetail.title: Copilot Seat Detail
CopilotSeatDetail.description: Detailed information about a Copilot seat assignment for a specific user, including activity tracking and plan type.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the Copilot seat was initially created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the seat was last updated.

pending_cancellation_date.description: Date when seat cancellation takes effect. Null if the seat is not pending cancellation.

last_activity_at.description: Timestamp of the user's most recent Copilot activity. Null if no activity has been recorded.

last_activity_editor.description: The IDE or editor used during the user's most recent Copilot activity (e.g., vscode, jetbrains). Null if no activity recorded.

last_authenticated_at.description: Timestamp when the user last authenticated with Copilot. Null if the user has never authenticated.

plan_type.description: The Copilot plan type for this seat assignment.

assignee.description: The GitHub user assigned to this Copilot seat.

assigning_team.description: The team through which this seat was assigned, if applicable.

CopilotBillingInfo.title: Copilot Billing Info
CopilotBillingInfo.description: Copilot billing and subscription information for an organization, including seat breakdown and feature policy settings.

seat_breakdown.description: Breakdown of seat counts by status.

seat_management_setting.description: How Copilot seats are managed for the organization.

ide_chat.description: Organization policy for Copilot Chat in IDEs.

platform_chat.description: Organization policy for Copilot Chat on github.com.

cli.description: Organization policy for Copilot in the CLI.

public_code_suggestions.description: Policy for whether Copilot may suggest code matching public code.

plan_type.description: The Copilot plan type for the organization.

CopilotSeatsResponse.title: Copilot Seats Response
CopilotSeatsResponse.description: Paginated response listing all Copilot seat assignments for an organization.

total_seats.description: Total number of Copilot seats for the organization.

seats.description: Array of individual seat assignment details.

SelectedTeamsRequest.title: Selected Teams Request
SelectedTeamsRequest.description: Request body for adding or removing teams from a Copilot subscription.

selected_teams.description: List of team slugs within the organization.

SelectedUsersRequest.title: Selected Users Request
SelectedUsersRequest.description: Request body for adding or removing individual users from a Copilot subscription.

selected_usernames.description: List of GitHub usernames who are members of the organization.

SeatsCreatedResponse.title: Seats Created Response
SeatsCreatedResponse.description: Response returned after adding users or teams to a Copilot subscription.

seats_created.description: The number of new Copilot seats that were created.

SeatsCancelledResponse.title: Seats Cancelled Response
SeatsCancelledResponse.description: Response returned after removing users or teams from a Copilot subscription.

seats_cancelled.description: The number of Copilot seats set to pending cancellation.

ContentExclusionRules.title: Content Exclusion Rules
ContentExclusionRules.description: Content exclusion rules mapping repository names to arrays of file path patterns that Copilot is prevented from accessing.

additionalProperties.description: List of file path patterns to exclude for this repository.
